properties.entry: Next-generation Groupware_Introduction of main functions_Reference to transferred customers
Free trial user of Groupware Demo site
Free trial guide of Groupware Demo site
This is an mail to inform you of the completion of service opening.
[U+ Works] This is the approval request e-mail for the user.
This is an email with instructions on how to use the service.
This is an e-mail to confirm your subscription request.
[U+ Works] This is an email to confirm subscription service details.
Inquiries received through online inquiry will be answered after checking in the customer center and can be checked on the online customer center screen.
When the answer is available, a text message will be sent to the mobile phone number registered below.
When submitting an error, please enter the user's ID Information and the specific error details.
* Please enter your ID for error inquiries and your full name for general inquiries. ID is used when checking the error log.
File can be uploaded up to 200 MB.
and reward you with better service.
You are not authorized to use the requested page.
• You are not authorized to use the menu or accessed the wrong path, please move to the shortcut button below.
• For inquiries about authority, please contact the company groupware administrator.
• The page's address is incorrect, has been changed or deleted and is currently unavailable.
• If you contact the company groupware administrator about access problems, we will take immediate action.
Access to the service is not smooth.
• Access to the service is not smooth. We are working hard to solve the problem, so please log in again after a while.
• In case of persistent problems, please contact the company groupware manager.
No page or service exists for that request.
• The page may be in the process of being prepared or closed, so it would be appreciated if you let the company groupware manager know about it.
• We apologize for the inconvenience, and please go to the shortcut button below.
Because there are many users, the connection is not smooth.
• Access to the service is not smooth. We are working hard to solve the problem, so please log in again after a while.
• In case of persistent problems, please contact the company groupware manager.
We strongly recommend upgrading the web browser.
The web browser currently in use has weak security to protect users from hacking and malware infection
and poor web compatibility, such as broken web site characters.
Also, since Microsoft's technical support for Internet Explorer 11 and earlier versions will end
in January 2016, we strongly recommend upgrading the web browser.
U+Works is optimized for Google Chrome browser. Internet Explorer (IE) 9 users must upgrade to 10 or higher before use.
※ Safari, Firefox, and Chrome browsers may experience inconvenience in using some ActiveX-based website services.
Groupware cannot be used on the currently connected IP.
If you are a groupware administrator or a user allowed access, you can log in by clicking the login button below.
• Your password has expired. Please reset with a new password.
Mix 3 of English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8 to 20 characters)
E-mail fraud damage reported by the Korea International Trade Association' statistics
※ If a spam mail is sent, it may not be possible to send the entire company email.
Mix 3 of English (large), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8 to 20 characters)
Do not use more than 3 duplicate characters
Do not use more than 3 consecutive numbers
Do not set password same as ID
Notice of termination of previous groupware (onnet) service operation
User firewall operation request guidance according to messenger server expansion
[Notice] Details of function changes due to distribution on December 17, 2020 (Thu)
[Notice] Notice of termination of U+Box link function in February 2021
[Notice] Details of function changes due to distribution on Thursday, November 19, 2020
You can reset the Password by using U+Works user Information.
The reset Password is sent to the external E-mail address (phone number) you entered.
ID and external E-mail address (phone number) you entered must match the user Information registered in U+Works,
It may take some time to receive E-mail (SMS).
Grand Open! April 2021, Groupware reform event in progress!
You can set the main widget by double clicking.
There is no group to which you belong.
There is no project to which you belong.
There is no club to which you belong.
This is the list of members in the chat room.
Downloadable up to 5 days after uploading
Do you want to delete the [ooo] group?
Do you want to leave the chat room?
When you leave the chat room, the chat list is deleted and the chat room is also deleted from mobile and PC messenger.
Do you want to invite Hong gil dong to the chat room?
Internet phone settings are not set. Please set up the Internet phone through the User / Admin Setting
Please enter the login information through the User / Admin Setting.
Select the person to invite and click the Confirm button.
Select the person to invite and click the Confirm button.
max 250 per chrome session / 1 PC max = 250 (main window session) + 250 (secret window session) = 500
1 input = access by the number of connections every 0.1 second / 10 input = access by the number of connections per second
-> After 1 second -> Stop connection -> After 1 second -> Reconnect
Not connected. Please click after connecting.
Not connected. Please click after connecting.
Click the Confirm button to connect to WebMessenger.
* Checking Read, Unread of Chat function is not available in WebMessenger.
Click the Confirm button to connect to WebMessenger.
* Checking Read, Unread of Chat function is not available in WebMessenger.
Free trial guide of Groupware Demo site
Do you agree to the personal information collection and use consent above?
※ You can use the demo site after you agree to the personal information collection and use consent.
Thank you for requesting the demo.
Please agree to the personal information collection and use consent.
Please enter at least 10 digits of contact number.
Please select the number of people in the company.
Please enter the valid email address.
The event ends and move to the main screen.
U+ Works Super Special Event image
U+ Works Super Special Event Details button
New U+ works Subscription Event image
New U+ works Subscription Event Details button
Free Corporate Messenger Subscription Event image
Free Corporate Messenger Subscription Participate button
Do you agree to the personal information collection and use consent above?
* Please Enter the correct mobile phone number to receive the prize.
Do you agree to the personal information collection and use consent above?
* Please Enter the correct mobile phone number to receive the prize.
, U+ groupware user subscription is complete.
After administrator's approval, log in to use the service.
Consent to the terms and conditions of the service and the personal information collection and use.
Marked items are required feild. Please fill out without omission.
Only English (small) and numbers can be entered (2-20 characters)"
This access URL can be used in groupware.
※ The default domain is http://companyid.uplusworks.co.kr, and you can change to another domain after signing up.
※ If you want to sign up with your own domain, sign up with a random ID and request “domain change” to the customer center.
Click to request the company-only domain.
It will be used as a means to verify your identity, so please enter it correctly.
Search for a company by business registration number
Enter the search word exactly according to the guide and examples.
Enter the street name and the building name or building number by separating them with a space (a space for the street name and the building number).
If you do not know the road name, you can check it in
the road name address information system.
Hangang-daero 32 (Please enter 32 after leaving a space for Hangang-daero.)
Hangang-daero 102-gil, 32 (Please enter 32 after leaving a space for Hangang-daero 102-gil.)
For individual businesses, identification (mobile phone or i-PIN) is required.

Failed to check ESB (Street Name Address).
Please contact the customer center.

Failed to check ESB (Common Code check - Type of business).
Please contact the customer center.
For individual businesses, identification (mobile phone or i-PIN) is required.

Failed to operate linkage result of Mobile Phone authentication (KMC) linkage.
Please contact the customer center.

Failed to operate linkage result of I-PIN authentication (KCB) linkage.
Please contact the customer center.
Failed to operate linkage result of I-PIN authentication (KCB) linkage.
Failed to operate linkage result of Mobile Phone authentication (KMC) linkage.
The business registration number format is incorrect.
After entering the business regstration number, select New Registration or User Registration in the registration confirmation pop-up.
The corporate number format is incorrect.
For individual businesses, identification (mobile phone or i-PIN) is required.
Groupware access URL format is incorrect
Please do the duplicate check of Groupware access URL.
※ If you are a Windows XP SP2 or Internet Explorer 7 user, click the pop-up blocker notification bar at the top of the screen to allow pop-ups.
Marked items are required feild. Please fill out without omission.
1% discount on the rate when direct debit is selected
A tax invoice is provided when applying for an invoice, and invoices can be received around the 15th of each month.
From 16.02.01, according to LG U+ policy, only e-mail billing is possible for new subscriptions.
An invoice will be sent to that e-mail. Please do the e-mail validation you entered.
Select the account holder ID type.
(Excluding -, only numbers! Please enter the birth day as YYMMDD ex> 800101 as your resident registration date.)
Please attach the withdrawal agreement file.
※ In accordance with Article 15 of the Electronic Financial Transactions Act, it is required to keep the evidence of the payer's (depositor's) withdrawal agreement when registering for direct debit.
Please print out and fill out the 'Direct Debit Withdrawal Agreement', and be sure to scan (or take a photo) and attach it after signing.
Select the type of card opening number
(Excluding -, only numbers! Please enter the birth day as YYMMDD ex> 800101 as your resident registration date.)

※ Please withdraw (payment) from your designated account (card number) on the designated withdrawal (payment) date without any separate notice about the fee to be paid by you (the account holder or member).
If you agree to the above, please click the checkbox.
Success : Electronic billing system do not require ESB verification.
Please enter the correct payment method information.
ESB (Account and Card Verification) verification failed. Please contact the customer center.
ESB (bank and card list) check failed. Please contact the customer center.
The phone number format is incorrect.
Enter the file name up to 200 characters. Please check the file name.
The file size exceeds 10MB. Please check the file size.
Only {파일확장자 이름} file extensions can be attached.
Enter the department name of the salesperson.
Marked items are required feild. Please fill out without omission.
Only English (small) letters, numbers, and periods can be used (2-20 characters)
The entered ID can be used.
Mix 3 of English (large/small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters)
It will be used as a means to verify your identity, so please enter it correctly.
This information is necessary for password verification, so please enter it correctly.
The phone number format is incorrect.
The two passwords do not match.
Mix 3 of English (large/small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters)
Do not use more than 3 duplicate characters
Do not use more than 3 consecutive numbers
Do not set password same as ID
※ Notifications mails such that are automatically sent when using the function are sent regardless of whether emails are received or not.
store, share, and manage work files
※ To receive e-mails, please change whether to receive
store, share, and manage work files
Only xls files can be uploaded.
You need to enter the e-mail address to apply for the new subscription and to check the registered subscription information.
Enter the email address you will use to sign up.
The authentication code has been sent. Please check the e-mail and enter the authentication code.
The company already is registered. You can log in for the registered company name.
, welcome to U+ Groupware service member.
From now on, you can use the services provided by U+ Groupware using the information below.
• The page address is incorrect, has been changed or deleted and is currently unavailable.
• Please double-check that the address of the page you entered is correct.
Promotion of Annual Leave Use Guide
Please change to a new password.
Login information does not match.\nPlease check the information.
An error occurred while switching accounts.\nPlease log in again.
